title: F1® 25
description:
Hone your racing skills in F1® 25 Season 6: Road to 2026.

A new era of Formula One® is about to begin, so jump into the cockpit to take on the latest events and unlock rewards.†

Braking Point 3

The legacy of Konnersport is at stake as a dramatic event throws the team into chaos. Can you fight back and finally put yourself in contention for the World Championship?

Take Konnersport’s Legacy Beyond the Braking Point Story

For the first time, you can extend your Konnersport experience through other game modes. Once you’ve finished Braking Point, take the team into Driver Career or My Team.

Design Your Own Team With Enhanced Customisation

Enhance both My Team and F1® World cars and create liveries that are more reflective of Formula One® as you customise driver numbers and move, scale or rotate logos

Push The Limits On Sub-Centimetre Accurate LIDAR Circuits

F1® 25 marks the beginning of our journey to update every circuit in the game with LIDAR (laser scanned) models of the real Grand Prix™ venues. This year, experience five rebuilt tracks; Bahrain, Miami, Melbourne, Suzuka, and Imola.

Team Up For New Online Co-op Events

Gear up for a brand new cooperative multiplayer mode in F1® World. Invitationals are new challenges where you and your friends race as a squad against AI drivers. Work as a team to earn points together with the emphasis firmly on collaboration to unlock shared rewards.

& More...

You'll find many smaller improvements throughout F1® 25 with new cinematics, updated podium scenes and Reverse Tracks, allowing you to enjoy the Austrian, Dutch, and British Grand Prix venues from a whole new perspective.

This game includes optional in-game purchases of virtual currency that can be used to acquire virtual in-game items.
